purpose: Reconcile Track B factory backlog selection status with merged product and beta-readiness PR evidence so completed tasks are not selected again.

router_contract.selection_rule: Only tasks with router_candidate_status ready or proposed can be selected; verified, partial_verified, blocked_dependency, blocked_human, and stale_not_selectable entries are not selectable.
